comments.author: dnsquared
comments.body: 🟢 nit: `./worktree.js` is imported twice (lines 14 and 15). Consolidating into a single `import { formatConflictContext, withGitTransport, withWorktree } from './worktree.js';` is stylistically cleaner. Optional — no lint rule enforces this today and it has no runtime effect.

comments.author: dnsquared
comments.body: Consolidated the duplicate `./worktree.js` imports into a single import in `stage-scaffold.ts`.
